_publications._publicationTitle: MIA is a potential biomarker for tumour load in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: The expression of Mia was found to be more intensive in the NF1-deficient cartilage of the Nf1Prx1 mice
details: More intensive Mia expression found in NF1-deficient cartilage at E14.5-E15.5 embryonic stages
